spec_match.rationale: Excellent mathematical mapping modeling queue capacity overflows (transformMs > budget) and predicted discard ratios accurately.

interactive.rationale: Superb interactive simulator. Binds multiple input sliders and updates utilization charts, health metrics, verdicts, and timeline visualizations in real time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Provides high educational value teaching developers how to size processing transforms relative to source framerates.

edge_cases.rationale: Calculates queue capacity correctly using custom loops and sets correct bounds.

references.rationale: Includes the mandatory ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms beautifully to standard monospace borders, metrics grids, and colored bars.

summary: The frame-budget-calculator is a highly useful educational tool that explains the physics of stream dropped frames and includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
